title: skopeo does not support credsStore

comments.body:
Looking deeper, this appears to be an issue with one of your dependencies.

https://github.com/containers/skopeo/blob/44beab63c975b23ce2b1782035b1f3b1a972369e/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/pkg/docker/config/config.go#L26-L29

It incorrectly ignores the `credsStore` field while unmarshaling. This is a known issue over there. https://github.com/containers/container-libs/issues/278
`copy` and `login` commands also have this issue.
Thanks for your report. As you note, this is a missing functionality in c/image, and will be fixed in there.
